<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Plugins; use Pest\Contracts\Plugins\HandlesArguments; use Pest\Exceptions\InvalidOption; /** * @internal */ final class ProcessIsolation implements HandlesArguments { use Concerns\HandleArguments; /** * {@inheritDoc} */ public function handleArguments(array $arguments): array { if ($this->hasArgument('--process-isolation', $arguments)) { throw new InvalidOption('The [--process-isolation] option is not supported.'); } return $arguments; } }
